## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] I tested locally before opening this PR.
- [ ] I verified no credentials, secrets, or tokens were added.
- [ ] I verified changed docs still match the real deployment process.
- [ ] If `Dashboard/index.html` changed, I confirmed the dashboard deploy workflow should publish `gh-pages`.
- [ ] I listed rollback steps in the PR description for medium/high-risk changes.

## Rollback Plan

State exactly how to revert this change if needed.
